name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, frequent discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate transaction matching instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: frequent discrepancies between bank statements and accounting records
